revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Ancestral shrine); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:31, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1198674542 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:31, 25 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Stub| {{WikiProject History|auto=yes|importance=}} {{WikiProject China|importance=mid}} }} == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified {{plural:1|one external link|1 external links}} on [[Ancestral shrine]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=744002102 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20150112153039/http://www.districtcouncils.gov.hk/tp/publications_links/TaiPo%20Book%20(Eng%20Ver)%2008%20Chap%2005.pdf to http://www.districtcouncils.gov.hk/tp/publications_links/TaiPo%20Book%20(Eng%20Ver)%2008%20Chap%2005.pdf When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' or '''failed''' to let others know (documentation at {{tlx|Sourcecheck}}). {{sourcecheck|checked=false}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 14:23, 12 October 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:31, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 2 external links on [[Ancestral shrine]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=789002302 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20140501144423/http://taiwanpedia.culture.tw/en/content?ID=2009 to http://taiwanpedia.culture.tw/en/content?ID=2009 *Added {{tlx|dead link}} tag to http://zumiao.jguo.cn/ *Corrected formatting/usage for http://www.districtcouncils.gov.hk/tp/publications_links/TaiPo%20Book%20%28Eng%20Ver%29%2008%20Chap%2005.pdf When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 18:56, 4 July 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:31, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ancestral_shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
